title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported record-breaking financial performance in 2023. Revenues increased 229% to $387.5 million, up from $117.8 million in 2022. Net Income was $261.2 million or $1.06 per diluted share versus a $694 million loss in 2022. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $419.9 million from a negative $543.4 million loss in 2022. Bitcoin Production increased 210% to 12,852 BTC in 2023 from 4,144 BTC in 2022. Hash Rate Growth: Energized hash rate surged 253% to 24.7 EH/s. Fleet Efficiency improved 21% to 24.5 joules per terahash. The company achieved geographic diversification with operations spanning 11 sites across three continents with over 900 megawatts capacity. In Q4 2023 alone, the company produced 4,242 bitcoin, surpassing all of fiscal 2022's production. As of December 31, 2023, Marathon held $357.3 million in unrestricted cash and 15,126 unrestricted bitcoin, with combined liquidity of $997 million.
